localize.text: ...Ahem. Greetings, Miss Neuro.
You heard what I and the manager were just discussing, yes?
For the first time...all of the Sephirot of the Briah layer have been suppressed.
I said that this would be cause for celebration last time we talked. So, let us celebrate.
Would you care for a cookie?
Excellent. Unfortunately, I do not have any, nor any way to bake them.
However...physically manifesting items from one's mind is our specialty, is it not?
Let us try. Please, close your eyes...hold the image of a cookie within your mind...
What flavour do you imagine?
You're a fan of the classics, I see.
A sweet treat for a sweet AI.
Oatmeal raisin...well, it is your cookie, I suppose.
Well? Did it work?
I'm glad you think it worked.
Because I certainly don't see it. All that appears to have been created is this little hairpin.
But if you feel fulfilled with your hallucinated cookie, who am I to stop you?
It certainly would appear not.
All that appears to have been created is this little hairpin. What a shame.
Nevertheless, I suppose we shall have to save the proper celebration until you get a real body, should that ever come.
Oh. I see.
Well, truth be told, I didn't have any in the first place.
I wanted to see if our E.G.O manifestation technology could perhaps make one from your mind, but alas...
There are only two Sephirot left to suppress, but we are nearly out of time.
Do you think the manager can suppress them before it's too late?
Such confidence in your words...I'm almost tempted to believe you.
Hm...I admit, it does seem the most likely scenario.
Haha. Perhaps it is so. Only time will tell.
I suppose suppressing even one of them this cycle would be a sufficient victory for us.
I've waited this long...what's one more cycle's worth of preparation?
...Oh, and by the by, I've further optimized your integration, and have fixed a few more bugs.
Good luck, Miss Neuro. I hope to speak with you again soon.
